- Offers synchronous and asynchronous (task-based) extraction, supporting both file URLs and base64 uploads.
- Access VLM document recognition results and tailor extraction with custom model parameters.
- Simple zero-configuration integration and comprehensive API credential security guidance.
- Professionally optimized for invoices, receipts, orders, contracts, and more; includes sample curl requests and best practices.
- Each user receives 100 free credits monthly; commercial license required for continued use.
description_zh: 这是一个企业级智能文档处理API，可从发票、收据、订单、合同等多类业务文档的PDF/图片/Office等10+格式中提取关键字段与明细行，输出结构化JSON或Excel并提供字段级置信度，典型用于财务报销、采购对账、合同要素抽取与业务录入自动化。能力边界在于仅覆盖文档识别与结构化抽取本身，不负责业务规则校验、流程审批或下游系统落库。关键技术形态包括同步/异步任务式调用、URL或base64文件输入、基于VLM的文档识别结果访问，以及可通过自定义模型参数进行抽取定制与优化。

title: Claw Soul Backup
description_en:
Store encrypted OpenClaw workspace backups and restore them via token-secured API using claw-vault.com with local encryption and credential management.

Latest changelog:
Use /Users/daniel/.config/claw-vault.json for credential path and keep skill instructions backup-focused.
description_zh: 该方案用于将 OpenClaw 工作区备份在本地加密后上传到 claw-vault.com，并通过带令牌鉴权的 API 执行加密备份的存储与恢复，同时包含本地凭据管理与持久化。能力边界在于仅覆盖备份/恢复链路与凭据配置，不涉及工作区内容编辑、协作或运行环境管理。典型场景是设备更换/重装后的快速恢复、跨机器迁移以及灾备回滚等需要安全保存与取回工作区快照的流程。关键技术形态包括客户端本地加密、令牌安全 API 访问，以及将凭据配置固定在用户目录下的 JSON 配置文件中。

title: Pretenziya Ru
description_en:
Составь претензию или жалобу в банк, магазин, управляющую компанию, госорган или работодателя по описанной ситуации.

Latest changelog:
- Изменена ссылка в атрибуции с @maya_logs на t.me/maya_logs.
- Других изменений в функционале и правилах составления претензии нет.
description_zh: 该能力用于根据用户描述的具体情况自动起草面向银行、商店、物业/ управляющая компания、政府机构或雇主的正式投诉/申诉（претензия/жалоба）文本，输出以规范文书为主而非提供法律结论。能力边界在于仅生成文本草案并依赖输入信息的完整性，不能替代律师意见、事实核验或代表用户提交与跟进。典型场景包括退款纠纷、服务质量争议、劳动权益问题、行政事项投诉等，关键技术形态为基于指令与情境描述的模板化文书生成与措辞规范化，更新仅涉及归因链接从 @maya_logs 改为 t.me/maya_logs，功能与规则不变。

title: Nalog Ru
description_en:
Рассчитай налог УСН 6%, НПД для самозанятых и страховые взносы ИП по введённым доходам и периоду.

Latest changelog:
- Исправлена ссылка на Telegram-канал в attribution-блоке: теперь t.me/maya_logs вместо @maya_logs.
- Версия обновлена до 1.0.2.
description_zh: 该能力可根据用户输入的收入与时间区间，计算俄罗斯税制下的УСН 6%简化税、面向自雇的НПД税以及个体工商户（ИП）的保险缴费，并输出对应金额结果。能力边界在于仅覆盖这几类税费的规则化计算，依赖输入数据的准确性，不处理会计做账、申报提交、税务咨询或法规争议场景。典型场景是自雇者或个体工商户在不同周期内快速估算税费负担与现金流。关键技术形态表现为参数化税务规则引擎/公式计算模块，按期间聚合收入并生成税费明细与汇总。

title: Dogovor Ru
description_en:
Объясни, разбери и выдели риски в российских договорах — аренды, трудовых, кредитных, ипотечных и любых других.

Latest changelog:
- Обновлена версия до 1.0.2.
- В attribution-блоке изменён Telegram-канал: @maya_logs заменён на t.me/maya_logs.
- Больше изменений не внесено.
description_zh: 该能力用于对俄文合同文本（如租赁、劳动、贷款、按揭等）进行解释拆解并识别潜在风险点，输出面向阅读理解与风险提示的分析结果。能力边界在于仅基于输入文本做语义与条款层面的推断，无法替代正式法律意见、也无法保证覆盖司法实践与最新法规变化。典型场景包括合同签署前审阅、条款谈判对比、风险清单与重点条款定位；关键技术形态主要是俄文法律文本解析、条款结构化抽取与风险规则/模型匹配生成。

title: Chinovnik Ru
description_en:
Переведи официальные письма, постановления, госдокументы и юридические тексты с бюрократического языка на понятный русский.

Latest changelog:
- Изменена ссылка в блоке Attribution: @maya_logs заменено на t.me/maya_logs.
- Версия повышена до 1.0.2.
description_zh: 该能力用于将官方信函、决定/ постановления、政府文件与法律文本从官僚体表述改写为通俗易懂的俄语，侧重提升可读性与理解效率而非提供法律结论或替代专业法律意见。典型场景包括公众解读政务公告、企业内部合规沟通、媒体/客服对政策内容的转述与摘要。关键技术形态是面向俄语的法律/政务文体识别与语义改写（paraphrase）能力，结合术语保真与语气降噪的风格迁移策略。最新变更仅涉及署名链接替换与版本号更新至 1.0.2。

title: Analizy Ru
description_en:
Расшифруй результаты медицинских анализов, объясни отклонения от нормы и подскажи на что обратить внимание врачу.

Latest changelog:
- Изменён Telegram-ник в блоке attribution: теперь t.me/maya_logs вместо @maya_logs.
- Номер версии обновлён на 1.0.2.
description_zh: 该能力用于对体检/化验单结果进行解读，说明哪些指标偏离参考范围、可能代表的常见原因，并给出就诊时可提醒医生重点关注的方向与追问问题；能力边界是不替代医生诊断与处方，无法仅凭化验结果确定病因或给出治疗方案，需结合症状、病史与复查。典型场景包括用户拿到血常规、生化、尿检、激素、甲功等报告后做初步理解与就医沟通准备。关键技术形态通常为文本/图片报告结构化抽取（指标-数值-单位-参考区间）、基于医学知识库与规则/统计模型的异常判定与解释生成，以及针对风险信号的分级提示与建议补充检查项。

title: Superset
description_en: Superset is a turbocharged IDE that allows you to run any coding agents to 10x your development workflow. - Run multiple agents simultaneously without context switching overhead - Isolate each task in its own sandbox so agents don't interfere with each other - Monitor all your agents from one place and get notified when they need attention - Review changes quickly with built-in diff viewer and editor Wait less, ship more.
description_zh:
Superset 是一款涡轮增压的 IDE，让你可以运行任何编码智能体，将开发工作流效率提升 10 倍。  
- 同时运行多个智能体，无需在不同上下文之间来回切换的开销  
- 将每个任务隔离在独立的沙箱中，避免智能体之间相互干扰  
- 在一个地方监控所有智能体，并在它们需要处理时收到通知  
- 使用内置 diff 查看器和编辑器快速审查变更  

等待更少，交付更多。

title: Claude Code Remote Control
description_en: Continue a local Claude Code session from your phone, tablet, or any browser using Remote Control. Works with claude.ai/code and the Claude mobile app.
description_zh: 使用 Remote Control 可在手机、平板或任何浏览器中继续本地 Claude Code 会话。兼容 claude.ai/code 和 Claude 移动应用。

title: Nano Banana 2
description_en: Google's latest image generation model Nano Banana 2 offers advanced world knowledge, production-ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.
description_zh: 谷歌最新的图像生成模型 Nano Banana 2 具备更强的世界知识、可直接用于生产的规格参数、主体一致性等多项能力，并以 Flash 级速度运行。

title: Perplexity Computer
description_en: Perplexity Computer unifies every current AI capability into one system. It can research, design, code, deploy, and manage any project end-to-end autonomously. It orchestrates 19 models in parallel, routes tasks to the best model, connects to your tools, remembers context, and runs secure agents with usage-based pricing and spend controls.
description_zh: Perplexity Computer 将当前所有 AI 能力统一整合到一个系统中。它可以端到端自主完成任何项目的研究、设计、编码、部署与管理。它可并行编排 19 个模型，将任务路由到最适合的模型，连接你的工具，记忆上下文，并以按使用量计费与支出控制的方式运行安全代理（secure agents）。

title: Mastra Code
description_en: If you’ve used a coding agent, you know the pain. You’re deep into a feature and everything is clicking. Then the context window fills up, it compacts, and key details are lost. Mastra Code is different. Powered by our state-of-the-art observational memory, it watches, reflects, and compresses context without losing important details. The result: long-running coding sessions that stay precise, letting you build faster, merge sooner, and ship more.
description_zh: 如果你用过编程代理，你一定知道那种痛苦：你正深耕一个功能点，一切都很顺畅。然后上下文窗口被塞满，开始压缩（compaction），关键细节随之丢失。Mastra Code 不一样。它由我们最先进的观察式记忆（observational memory）驱动，能够持续观察、反思，并在不丢失重要细节的情况下压缩上下文。结果就是：更长时间的编程会话依然保持精确，让你构建更快、更早合并（merge），并交付（ship）更多。

title: What's Up With That?
description_en: Read like any article like expert in one click. WUWT is a browser extension that creates a real-time map of the state of the art in any industry, then tells you what's new in any article you're reading - in 10 seconds. Then, run any of 35 AI tools based on mental models (Red Team, Causal Loop Diagrams, etc) or get a personalized research plan to run with a click. Auto-captures data points for your decisions as you read, and more.
description_zh: 一键把任何文章读得像专家一样。WUWT 是一款浏览器扩展，可实时生成任意行业“最前沿现状”的地图，并在你阅读任何文章时，在 10 秒内告诉你这篇文章里有哪些新内容。随后，只需点击一下即可运行基于心智模型（Red Team、因果回路图等）的 35 种 AI 工具，或获取个性化研究计划并一键执行。你在阅读过程中，它还会自动捕捉用于决策的数据点等更多功能。

title: Hacker News for macOS
description_en: A native macOS desktop client for Hacker News that goes beyond the website. Browse stories in a visual grid with article thumbnails, read articles side-by-side with comment threads, and use reader mode to focus on content. Built entirely with SwiftUI for a fast, native experience with full dark mode support, 15+ keyboard shortcuts, built-in ad blocking, and adjustable text scaling. Log in with your HN account to bookmark stories, hide items, and sync across sessions. Free and open-source.
description_zh: 一款原生 macOS 桌面客户端，专为 Hacker News 打造，体验不止于网页。以可视化网格浏览故事并显示文章缩略图；文章与评论串并排阅读；使用阅读模式专注内容。完全基于 SwiftUI 构建，带来快速、原生的使用体验，全面支持深色模式，提供 15+ 个键盘快捷键、内置广告拦截以及可调文字缩放。使用你的 HN 账号登录即可收藏故事、隐藏条目，并在不同会话间同步。免费且开源。

title: lemonpod.ai
description_en: Lemonpod.ai turns your calendar, Strava runs, Last.fm scrobbles, GitHub commits and more into a custom AI-narrated morning podcast. Pick from hosts with unique voices and personalities. Your day starts with recaps of yesterday's highlights, today's must-dos, workout stats, favorite tracks, and code streaks. Delivered easy via RSS or app. Great for busy lives. Check it at lemonpod.ai! 🚀
description_zh: Lemonpod.ai 可将你的日历、Strava 跑步记录、Last.fm scrobbles（听歌记录）、GitHub commits（提交）等内容整合，生成一档由 AI 旁白讲述的定制晨间播客。你可以从多位拥有独特嗓音与个性的主播中选择。新的一天从回顾昨天的精彩亮点、梳理今天的必做事项、汇总训练数据、你喜爱的曲目以及代码连续提交情况开始。通过 RSS 或 App 轻松订阅收听。特别适合忙碌的生活节奏。访问 lemonpod.ai 了解更多！ 🚀

title: Alkemi
description_en: What could your business could do if everyone had a data scientist in their pocket 24/7? Meet your AI data teammate, now in Slack. Slack is where decisions happen, but data still lives somewhere else. Alkemi brings powerful analytics into Slack through conversational AI, so teams can ask questions, explore insights, and generate reports or charts instantly using their own trusted business data. Ask: ~ What drove pipeline last week? ~ Which products are trending? ~ Where are deals stalling?
description_zh: 如果每个人的口袋里 24/7 都有一位数据科学家，你的企业能做些什么？认识你的 AI 数据队友——现已登陆 Slack。Slack 是做出决策的地方，但数据仍然存放在别处。Alkemi 通过对话式 AI 将强大的分析能力带入 Slack，让团队能够基于自身可信的业务数据随时提问、探索洞察，并即时生成报告或图表。你可以这样问：~ 上周是什么推动了销售管道（pipeline）？~ 哪些产品正在走红？~ 交易（deals）卡在了哪里？

title: MaxClaw by MiniMax
description_en: OpenClaw × MiniMax Agent × M2.5, now fully unlocked. No deployment. No extra API fees. 7×24 across Telegram / WhatsApp / Slack / Discord. Ready-made MiniMax Expert ecosystem. Upgraded built-in tools for real work.
description_zh: OpenClaw × MiniMax Agent × M2.5 现已全面解锁。无需部署。无额外 API 费用。Telegram / WhatsApp / Slack / Discord 全渠道 7×24 支持。即用型 MiniMax Expert 生态系统。升级版内置工具，真正用于实际工作。

title: mvntSTUDIO
description_en: Drop your banger, get the choreo. The vibe dancing era is here! mvntSTUDIO is a dance generation playground that turns any song into production-ready dance animation. From TikTok challenges to K-pop choreographies, visualize your imagination with dance. Built by an Epic MegaGrant recipient team.
description_zh: 发布你的热门神曲，立刻生成编舞。“氛围舞动”时代来了！mvntSTUDIO 是一个面向舞蹈一代的创作游乐场，可将任何歌曲转化为可直接用于制作的舞蹈动画。从 TikTok 挑战到 K-pop 编舞，用舞蹈把你的想象可视化。由 Epic MegaGrant 获得者团队打造。

title: HelixDB
description_en: After more than a year of development, HelixDB is now generally available! Whether you're an indie hacker building custom agent memory, or a Fortune 500 that needs an infinitely scalable and highly available OLTP graph/vector database, we can handle your workload. Star the repo! https://github.com/HelixDB/helix-db
description_zh: 经过一年多的开发，HelixDB 现已正式（GA）发布！无论你是独立开发者（indie hacker）在构建自定义的 agent 记忆，还是需要无限扩展且高可用的 OLTP 图/向量数据库的《财富》500 强企业，我们都能承载你的工作负载。欢迎给仓库点个 Star！https://github.com/HelixDB/helix-db

title: muno
description_en: Create AI agents to conduct voice conversations with your team and your users. Generate documents with conversation insights and summaries. Your agents can create, move and update tickets based on the conversation and boards they have access to.
description_zh: 创建 AI 智能体，与您的团队和用户进行语音对话。基于对话洞察与总结生成文档。您的智能体可根据对话内容以及其有权限访问的看板，创建、移动并更新工单。

title: Nix Capture
description_en: Bug reports often arrive without request context — no endpoint, no status code, just “it’s not working.” Nix Capture lets you record network requests while reproducing an issue and export everything engineers need in seconds. No DevTools. No technical knowledge required. Built for QA, support, and product teams who want actionable bug reports.
description_zh: Bug 报告常常缺少请求上下文——没有 endpoint、没有状态码，只有一句“用不了”。Nix Capture 让你在复现问题时录制网络请求，并在几秒内导出工程师所需的一切信息。无需 DevTools。无需任何技术知识。专为希望提交可执行、可落地 Bug 报告的 QA、客服支持与产品团队打造。

title: Flarehawk
description_en: Your security tools generate thousands of alerts a day. How many actually get investigated? Flarehawk does it for you. Real-time threat detection, automated investigation, and one-click fixes. Our ML engine builds a model unique to your environment and gets smarter every day. 5-year log retention, SSO, Slack integration, all built-in. Starting with Cloudflare Enterprise. Now in open beta.
description_zh: 你的安全工具每天都会生成成千上万条告警，真正被调查的有多少？Flarehawk 帮你搞定。实时威胁检测、自动化调查、一键修复。我们的 ML 引擎会构建一个专属于你环境的模型，并且每天都在变得更智能。5 年日志留存、SSO、Slack 集成，全部内置。从 Cloudflare Enterprise 起步。现已开放 Beta 测试。

title: Mirano
description_en: Transform complex data into professional, on-brand visuals in seconds. Mirano helps marketing and sales teams create custom infographics, charts, and slides with no design experience needed. Some of our Usecases: Repurpose Blog Content into LinkedIn Infographics Create Client-Ready Marketing Report slides in a single click Convert PDFs & Whitepapers into Shareable Graphics Turn Strategy & Process Docs into Client-Ready Visuals
description_zh:
几秒内将复杂数据转化为专业、符合品牌调性的视觉内容。Mirano 帮助市场与销售团队在无需任何设计经验的情况下，创建定制的信息图、图表和幻灯片。

部分使用场景：
- 将博客内容二次创作成 LinkedIn 信息图
- 一键生成可直接交付客户的营销报告幻灯片
- 将 PDF 与白皮书转换为可分享的图形内容
- 将战略与流程文档转化为可直接交付客户的可视化内容

title: BOSS.Tech Beta
description_en: BOSS.Tech: One SuperApp. Any Business Tool. Fully Connected. Running a business shouldn’t mean juggling dozens of apps. BOSS.Tech pulls it all together: calls, messages, invoices, contacts, events, finance and more! Synced, simplified, and smart.
description_zh: BOSS.Tech：一款超级应用。任何业务工具。全面互联。经营企业不该意味着同时折腾几十个应用。BOSS.Tech 将一切整合在一起：通话、消息、发票、联系人、活动、财务等！同步、简化、智能。

title: SnapFill
description_en: SnapFill automates your most tedious paperwork：filling forms from research grants to legal docs. Manual entry is slow, and most AI tools break document layouts. SnapFill solves this by building a structured Knowledge Hub from your own files to fill new forms with deep context. Crucially, our engine guarantees Perfect Formatting: your output PDF or Word doc looks identical to the original, with tables, fonts, and styles perfectly preserved.
description_zh: SnapFill 可自动化处理你最繁琐的文书工作：从科研资助申请到法律文件的表格填写。手动录入速度慢，而大多数 AI 工具会破坏文档版式。SnapFill 通过基于你的自有文件构建结构化的 Knowledge Hub（知识中心），以深度上下文为新表格自动填充，从而解决这一问题。关键在于，我们的引擎保证 Perfect Formatting（完美格式）：输出的 PDF 或 Word 文档在视觉上与原始文件完全一致，表格、字体与样式都能被完美保留。

title: UI Roast for Figma
description_en: Design reviews are polite. Users aren’t. UI Roast for Figma gives you brutally honest AI usability feedback before you ship or talk to real humans. Savage Mode exposes the uncomfortable truth—then tells you exactly how to fix it. Run it inside Figma in seconds. If it hurts a little, it’s working.
description_zh: 设计评审很客气，用户才不会。UI Roast for Figma 让你在发布前、甚至在和真实用户接触前，就能获得毫不留情的 AI 可用性反馈。Savage Mode 会揭开那些让人不舒服的真相——然后准确告诉你该怎么改。几秒钟内直接在 Figma 里运行。要是有点扎心，说明它起作用了。

title: onsa.ai
description_en: Replace your sales stack with one chat. 5 AI agents build ICPs, find qualified leads, write personalized outreach and pre-meeting memos. No workflows, no learning curve. Free plan, 50 messages/day, no credit card.
description_zh: 用一个聊天窗口替换你的销售技术栈。5 个 AI 代理可构建 ICP（理想客户画像）、寻找合格线索、撰写个性化外联内容和会前备忘录。无需工作流，无学习成本。免费方案：每天 50 条消息，无需信用卡。

title: Launch In Public
description_en: LaunchInPublic is a community for founders, indie hackers, and makers who ship real products and share real traction. Most founders build in silence. Then launch to zero users. we changes that. Inside the community, builders share: • Product launches • Growth metrics • Revenue milestones • Marketing experiments • Failures & pivots No idea validation posts. No fake guru advice. Just real builders launching publicly and improving together. If you’re building something - ship it and share it.
description_zh:
LaunchInPublic 是一个面向创始人、独立开发者（indie hackers）和创客（makers）的社区，成员会交付真正的产品并分享真实的 traction（增长/进展）。大多数创始人都是默默在做，结果一上线就零用户。我们改变这一点。

在社区里，建设者会分享：
• 产品发布（Product launches）  
• 增长指标（Growth metrics）  
• 收入里程碑（Revenue milestones）  
• 营销实验（Marketing experiments）  
• 失败与转向（Failures & pivots）

不收“点子验证（idea validation）”帖。没有假装的 guru 建议。只有真正的建设者公开发布、一起持续改进。

如果你正在做点什么——就把它做出来（ship it），并分享出来。

title: Endee.io
description_en: Endee.io is a next-generation vector database engineered for unmatched scalability, speed, and reliability in AI-driven applications. Designed to power large-scale semantic search, recommendation systems, and generative AI workloads, Endee.io seamlessly scales from prototype to production without compromising performance.
description_zh: Endee.io 是新一代向量数据库，专为在 AI 驱动应用中实现无与伦比的可扩展性、速度和可靠性而设计。Endee.io 旨在为大规模语义搜索、推荐系统和生成式 AI 工作负载提供支持，可从原型阶段无缝扩展到生产环境，而不牺牲性能。

title: HireFlow
description_en: AI mock interviews with real-time voice feedback in 74+ languages. Get a personalized interview coach that adapts to your role, asks follow-up questions, and scores your answers. Used by 2,500+ candidates. Free to start.
description_zh: 支持 74+ 种语言的 AI 模拟面试，提供实时语音反馈。获得一位个性化的面试教练：可根据你的岗位自适应调整，提出追问，并为你的回答打分。已被 2,500+ 名候选人使用。免费开始。

title: TapGPT
description_en: TapGPT lets you create personal apps in minutes. Describe the tool you need: a habit tracker, trip budget planner, pension tracker, gym log. TapGPT generates a working web app with real UI. No coding. No templates. Just the exact app you want, built the way you want it.
description_zh: TapGPT 让你在几分钟内创建个性化应用。只需描述你需要的工具：习惯追踪器、旅行预算规划器、养老金追踪器、健身记录等。TapGPT 会生成一个带真实 UI 的可用 Web 应用。无需编程。没有模板。只要你想要的那款应用，并按你希望的方式构建。

title: Organic Intelligence Protocol (OIP)
description_en: ​"Developed by AI Architect Sudharsan Das, OIP solves infrastructure dependency. Officially recognized as 'Visionary' by OpenAI on Jan 28, 2026. This 24-page sovereign protocol protects $5.2B in IP assets. Seeking global partners or acquisition to secure this National Asset."
description_zh: 由 AI 架构师 Sudharsan Das 开发，OIP 解决了基础设施依赖问题。该项目于 2026 年 1 月 28 日被 OpenAI 官方认定为“Visionary（远见者）”。这份 24 页的主权协议可保护价值 52 亿美元的知识产权（IP）资产。现寻求全球合作伙伴或收购方，以确保这一国家资产的安全。

title: Nova CLI
description_en: Master Your Workflow with Compass Nova CLI. Elevate your development environment with a CLI that integrates with your IDE. From guided code generation to advanced task execution, Compass Nova simplifies the complex so you can focus on what matters.
description_zh: 使用 Compass Nova CLI 掌控你的工作流。借助可与 IDE 集成的命令行工具提升开发环境。从引导式代码生成到高级任务执行，Compass Nova 化繁为简，让你专注于真正重要的事情。

title: ClawHost.chat
description_en: Managed cloud hosting for OpenClaw AI agents. Run your autonomous AI 24/7 — no hussle, no server management. Supports Claude, GPT-5, Gemini, Kimi K2.5, and any OpenAI-compatible model. Comes with Kimi K2.5 already included inside for free.
description_zh: 为 OpenClaw AI 代理提供托管式云主机服务。让你的自主 AI 7×24 小时运行——无需折腾，无需服务器管理。支持 Claude、GPT-5、Gemini、Kimi K2.5 以及任何兼容 OpenAI 的模型。内置并免费包含 Kimi K2.5。

title: SVG Weave
description_en: SVG Weave is a visual node graph editor for animating SVGs with AI. Upload an SVG (or generate one from text/images), describe the motion you want, and watch AI stream production-ready CSS @keyframes in real time. Chain renders together- each step builds on the last. Connect two SVGs to auto-generate state transitions. Click any element to fine-tune it with an AI chat editor. A built-in timeline lets you scrub and inspect every animation. Start free with 20 credits. No design tools needed.
description_zh: SVG Weave 是一款用于借助 AI 为 SVG 制作动画的可视化节点图编辑器。上传一个 SVG（或从文本/图片生成一个），描述你想要的运动效果，即可观看 AI 实时流式生成可直接用于生产环境的 CSS @keyframes。你可以将多次渲染串联起来——每一步都在上一步基础上继续构建。连接两个 SVG 可自动生成状态过渡。点击任意元素，可通过 AI 聊天编辑器进行精细调整。内置时间轴支持拖动播放头（scrub），并检查每段动画。免费开始，赠送 20 点额度。无需任何设计工具。

title: rule1
description_en: The first truly agentic AI for marketing. Rule1 connects to your ad accounts, watches every creative across channels, and tells you exactly what's working and why. Most analytics tools show you numbers. Rule1 shows you which visual elements, hooks, copy patterns, and formats actually drive conversions — then helps you ship more of them. We built hitrate modules, naming convention extractors to auto-tag your ads, and an AI agent that turns raw performance data into actionable creative briefs
description_zh: 首个真正具备代理能力（agentic）的营销 AI。Rule1 可连接你的广告账户，监测各渠道的每一条创意，并准确告诉你哪些有效以及原因。大多数分析工具只给你一堆数字；Rule1 则会指出究竟是哪些视觉元素、吸引点（hooks）、文案模式和格式真正推动了转化——并帮助你产出并上线更多此类内容。我们构建了 hitrate 模块、命名规范提取器，用于自动为你的广告打标签，以及一个 AI 代理（AI agent），将原始绩效数据转化为可执行的创意简报。

title: Copana
description_en: Copana turns Claude Code into a personal AI that actually knows you. No app, no server, no Docker just markdown files. Your AI's memory, personality, and preferences live inmd files, and more simple then OpenClaw, and even lighter then NanoClaw! 50 files. ~3,600 lines of code. 5 dependencies. Setup in 30 seconds. Open source, MIT licensed.
description_zh: Copana 把 Claude Code 变成一个真正了解你的个人 AI。无需应用、无需服务器、无需 Docker，只要 Markdown 文件。你的 AI 的记忆、个性和偏好都存放在 .md 文件中，比 OpenClaw 更简单，甚至比 NanoClaw 更轻量！50 个文件，约 3,600 行代码，5 个依赖，30 秒完成配置。开源，MIT 许可。
